title: Program Review Action Ledger - July 7, 2026
body:
Program review action ledger — July 7, 2026

Confirmed action items:
- Alice: finalize the launch checklist owner table by 2026-07-10.
- Bob: schedule customer interview synthesis review by 2026-07-11.
- Priya: refresh the Q3 metric glossary before dashboard publication.
- Chen: confirm localization review slots for the help-center update.
- Dana: circulate the partner FAQ draft to support leads.

Roll-up: the confirmed rows above have owner/date pairs and are ready for reconciliation. No appendix-only or unverified candidate items were attached to this note.
